name: Dipped Candies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together butter and sweetened condensed milk, adding powdered sugar until the mixture is smooth and thin (approximately 2 lbs of sugar). Divide into separate bowls for different flavors or nuts.
2. Add 1 teaspoon of flavoring to each bowl. It is best to use powdered flavorings as they do not thicken the mixture further.
3. Optionally add coconut, peanut butter, or nuts to each bowl for different types of finished candy.
4. Knead the "dough" in additional powdered sugar until it is firm and free-flowing.
5. Form small balls from the dough using a cookie scoop or spoon.
6. Melt almond bark in a double boiler or microwave, being careful not to boil or scorch it. Allow the bark to cool slightly so that it thickens.
7. Dip each candy ball into the melted almond bark, coating them well. Remove and place on wax paper-lined baking sheets.
8. Optionally, swirl additional peanut butter or chocolate into the coated candies for a more decadent treat.
